title: internal/mkcw.GenerateMeasurement(): check for libkrunfw-sev.so.5
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

We have to care about the soname of the file, even though we never call it directly, and it was bumped since the last time I looked, so just accept that whatever name it has, any libkrunfw-sev.so.* is as good as any other.

#### How to verify it

Install libkrunfw-sev, check what it provides.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
